package handlers

import (
	"database/sql"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func SearchUsers(c *gin.Context, db *sql.DB) error {
	_, err := db.QueryContext(c.Request.Context(), "SELECT id FROM users WHERE team = ? OR region = ? OR status = ? OR tier = ?", c.Query("team"), c.Query("region"), c.Query("status"), c.Query("tier"))
	return err
}
